rawInstruction: Optionally, if your yarn holds knots poorly or tends to fray at the ends, dot some clear nail polish or white glue at the knot and at the ends, to secure them.
summary: Apply glue or nail polish to secure knots and ends.
title: Optionally, if your yarn holds knots poorly or tends to fray at the ends, dot some clear nail polish or white glue at the knot and at the ends, to secure them.
